ambiguities.requirement: The system shall look for a suitable session if the request is accepted.

potential_missing.source_sentence: From there, the session can be completed, or it can be cancelled.
It is also possible to cancel a selected session and go back to choose again.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall start a training request upon creation.
The system shall send the request for approval after its creation.
The system shall look for a suitable session if the request is accepted.
The system shall perform enrolment once a session is chosen.
The system shall satisfy the request if enrolment is confirmed.
The system shall allow completion of the session after enrolment confirmation.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Once a session is chosen, enrolment is done. If enrolment is confirmed, the request is satisfied.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall perform enrolment once a session is chosen and satisfy the request if enrolment is confirmed.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow cancellation of a selected session and selection of a new one.
hallucinations.reason: There is no mention in the source text about allowing the selection of a new session after cancelling an existing one. The source text only mentions that sessions can be cancelled.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall satisfy the request if enrolment is confirmed.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement could be interpreted as either satisfying the training request or the session, which is ambiguous.
